variables.name: BATCH
variables.description: Genotyping batch in which data was generated

variables.name: GROUPING_PCA_LABEL1
variables.description: Level 1 tag used in PCA plots.  1) For UCSF, this variable contains a full description of reported ethnicity.  "UCSF Other" is used for any subject without reported ethnicity.  2) For LOLIPOP Indian Asians, this variable contains reported language.  "IndianAsian" if none reported. 3) For all other subjects (except Duke Genetics of Memory subjects), if grandparental country data exists and is in agreement, grandparental country. If grandparental country data exists and is not in agreement, literal "Mixed".  Otherwise,  COUNTRY_SELF.

variables.name: GROUPING_PCA_LABEL2
variables.description: Level 2 tag used in PCA plots.  Reflects region.

variables.name: POPRES_GENDER
variables.description: Gender used by POPRES.  Reported if exists, else inferred from sex linked data if successfully genotyped.

variables.name: POPRES_GENDER_INFERRED
variables.description: Is POPRES gender inferred from sex linked data? NA when POPRES_GENDER is Unknown.

variables.name: STATUS_OVERALL
variables.description: Overall QC status for the subject

variables.name: PC1
variables.description: Principal Component 1: distinguishes between Africans from non-Africans

variables.name: PC2
variables.description: Principal Component 2: distinguishes East Asians from Africans and Europeans, with South Asians and Mexicans at intermediate values

variables.name: PC3
variables.description: Principal Component 3: distinguishes South Asians from East Asians

variables.name: PC4
variables.description: Principal Component 4: distinguishes Mexicans from non-Mexicans

variables.name: PC5
variables.description: Principal Component 5: reveals a north-to-south cline within Europeans

variables.name: PC6
variables.description: Principal Component 6: distinguishes the African Americans from the HapMap Africans

variables.name: PC7
variables.description: Principal Component 7: separates the three East Asian populations (Japan, HapMap CHB, Taiwan)

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use. SNP_Array: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; SNP_Sequence: SNP genotypes derived from sequence data

variables.name: COUNTRY_SELF
variables.description: Indicates the country where the subject was born.

variables.name: EUROPEAN_LABEL
variables.description: The geographic label for a sampled individual was based upon the self-reported labels attributed to 1) the four grandparents, 2) two grandparents and one parent, 3) the two parents, or 4) the individual, based upon data availability. Conflicting labels of ancestors resulted in an attribution to a higher level label.  Europe was divided the four regions UN Northern, UN Western, UN Southern and UN Eastern Europe as defined in the UN geo-scheme for Europe.  Those 4 groups were then further subdivided based on sampling of 500 individuals as follows:  UN Northern into North-Western Europe (Great Britain & Ireland) and Northern Europe which includes all other UN Northern countries but Finland.  UN Western Europe was split into Western Europe (Belgium, France, Luxembourg, and the Netherlands) and Central Europe(Austria, Germany, and Switzerland). Finally, UN Southern Europe was split into South-WesternEurope (Spain, Portugal, and Andorra) and South-Eastern Europe (all others).

variables.name: ORIGIN_LABEL
variables.description: Based on this information, we first attributed a best-guess geographic label to each of the family members based on the following rules: 1) missing data was ignored; 2) if ethnicity conflicted with birthplace or first language data, only ethnicity was considered; 3) if birthplace and first language disagreed, a higher level container label was chosen (e.g. an individual who was born in France but reported his first language to be Norwegian was labeled European); and 4) white individuals born in the US or Canada were attributed according to the first language information alone, if other than English.

variables.name: WORLD_LABEL
variables.description: Labels defined as follows:  African American: self identified as African ancestry from Jamaica or Grenada, European: self identified as European ancestry from UN Northern, UN Western, UN Southern, UN Eastern or a mixture of these  4 groups, Hispanic: self identified Hispanic from Colombia, Guyana, or  Uruguay, Southern Asia: self identified as origin from Afghanistan, India, Nepal, Pakistan or Sri Lanka, Western Asia: self identified as origin from Iraq, Jordan, Qatar, Turkey or Yemen and Other: Ancestry missing, incomplete or with small numbers from regions other than those specified

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by the Data Access Committee (DAC)
